patches.find: registered on the same day — a batch expansion of the WIN count using well-established constants that add no discriminating power
patches.replace: registered on 2026-04-05 — hours before this critical review was launched — a batch expansion of the WIN count using well-established constants that add no discriminating power. Strategic timing: adopting nineteenth-century tidal constants as new "predictions" on the eve of an independent audit raises the question of whether these WINs were added to inflate the count rather than because the dome model genuinely predicts them
patches.rationale: ISS-303: The text already notes V51.0 registration but omits the specific date and its significance — hours before the review launched. Adding this context makes the timing pattern explicit and notable for the reader.

patches.find: of {{TOTAL_WINS}} WINs relabel standard physics as "aetheric" phenomena — the single most common structural pattern in the model
patches.replace: of {{TOTAL_WINS}} WINs (nearly three-quarters of all claims) relabel standard physics as "aetheric" phenomena — the single most common structural pattern in the model
patches.rationale: ISS-306: The aggregate count is already computed via placeholder but the proportional significance is not highlighted. Adding a qualitative fraction makes the systemic scale immediately apparent without hardcoding a number.

patches.find:
Refuted by Data: {{TALLY_REFUTED}} (direct measurements contradict the claim)

Standard Model Explains: {{TALLY_STD}} (observation is real but mainstream physics already accounts for it)

Self-Contradicted: {{TALLY_SELFCON}} (the dome's own geometry, if worked through honestly, predicts radically different values)

Misleading: {{TALLY_MISLEADING}} (data misrepresented, duplicated, cherry-picked, or logically contradictory)

Not Demonstrated: {{TALLY_NOTDEMO}} (unconfirmed by independent replication)

Unfalsifiable: {{TALLY_UNFALSIFIABLE}} (theological assertions, not testable)
patches.replace:
Self-Contradicted: {{TALLY_SELFCON}} (the dome's own geometry, if worked through honestly, predicts radically different values — the strongest possible internal refutation)

Refuted by Data: {{TALLY_REFUTED}} (direct measurements from published literature contradict the claim)

Standard Model Explains: {{TALLY_STD}} (observation is real but mainstream physics already accounts for it; the dome adds no new predictive power)

Misleading: {{TALLY_MISLEADING}} (data misrepresented, duplicated, cherry-picked, or logically contradictory)

Not Demonstrated: {{TALLY_NOTDEMO}} (built on unconfirmed data, post-hoc curve fits, or circular derivations; the proposed mechanism is asserted but not independently verified)

Unfalsifiable: {{TALLY_UNFALSIFIABLE}} (theological assertions, no testable physical content)
patches.rationale: ISS-447 + ISS-448: Reorders verdict legend by evidential force (Self-Contradicted first as strongest, then Refuted, Standard, Misleading, Not Demonstrated, Unfalsifiable) and expands Not Demonstrated definition to cover post-hoc fits and undemonstrated mechanisms, not just replication failures.
